name: ui2code-n-scalable-ui-to-code-generation
description: Convert visual UI designs to code at scale using vision-language models, with test-time scaling for improved accuracy and code quality. Trigger: When automating code generation from UI mockups or screenshots
content:
## UI2Code^N: Scalable UI-to-Code Generation

Convert visual UI designs to code at scale using vision-language models, with test-time scaling for improved accuracy and code quality.

### Core Concept

Visual-to-code synthesis using multimodal models with inference scaling

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.08195

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When automating code generation from UI mockups or screenshots
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: UI2Code^N: A Visual Language Model for Test-Time Scalable Interactive UI-to-Code Generation
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.08195
